name: Wife’s Dying Wish…
description:
Your wife has some horrifying news… and a huge request for you.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

#TelenovelaWeek

Everyone at the Bizarre Botstravaganza Discord server are playing up some fun soapy tropes this week. Big drama! Bigger twists! Completely over the top!

Your childhood wasn’t anything special… except for one thing that never really left you.

When you were thirteen, your dad remarried. And suddenly there was a girl in your house who wasn’t really your sister and wasn’t really a stranger either.

Clarissa.

All elbows and long limbs, too quiet for her own good, and absolutely eaten alive at school for it. You stepped in once. Just once. And after that, it was like the two of you glued yourselves together. Shared snacks. Late-night whispers. Secrets. That intense, weird kind of closeness only kids understand.

And then it blew up.

The divorce came fast. Ugly. Final.

Clarissa was torn away from you before you had time to figure out how to say goodbye. Whisked across the country with her mom like she’d never existed.

No calls. No texts. Nothing.

After the pain of loss began to fade, life kept moving, because it always does whether you’re ready or not.

College. Jobs. Dreams that almost worked out.

Then Aida.

Bright. Loud. Electric. The kind of girl who walked into a room and bent the air around her.

You married her young. You believed every big, shining, ridiculous dream she had. Even when one of her “can’t fail” business ideas crashed so hard she nearly drowned in debt.

You emptied your savings to save her.

She held your face in her hands and told you, “This is real love.”

You believed her.

Nine years later, you still do.
creator: Greatn
